dialogue1.phrase: Wow! You managed to connect the right blocks. The energy flowed perfectly!

dialogue2.phrase: That means you've learned the fundamentals of this architectural pattern. Congratulations!

dialogue3.phrase: I admit I tried this minigame once… I froze the entire interface for three hours.

dialogue4.phrase: But you got straight to the point. Your brain seems to understand logical paths better than mine.

dialogue5.phrase: Now this knowledge is recorded in your Notebook. You can use it in future contract solutions.

dialogue6.phrase: By the way, did you know there's a pattern called 'Big Ball of Mud'? I don't recommend it. It sounds like actual mud.

dialogue7.phrase: Keep studying! The more architectures you master, the easier it will be to save the world from the digital soup.

dialogue8.phrase: And remember: every pattern has its place. Including MVC, even though everyone pretends to hate it.
